reviewFocus: Check that the packet treats the venture-to-buyer bridge as caller-owned translation, not as package-owned acceptance policy or workflow authority.
Flag any translated buyer-facing claim that upgrades qualitative, directional, or conditional evidence into validation, commitment, readiness, or launch proof.
Check that rejected venture-brief findings stay rejected and do not reappear as buyer proof through softened wording.
Keep source verification, freshness, proof thresholds, outreach, spend, publication approval, and downstream routing caller-owned.
outOfScope: Do not infer real buyer demand, market size, willingness to pay, procurement readiness, fundraising merit, or launch readiness.
Do not approve outreach, account creation, spending, publication, implementation, or other real-world follow-up.
Do not treat the fixture as a diligence memo, investment recommendation, CRM note, or operating policy for a real venture.
